The following events took place in '''990 BBY'''.

==Events==
*The [[Khommite/Legends|Khommites]] believe they have reached the pinnacle of their civilization.<ref name="alien">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref>
*[[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]] goes to [[Tython/Legends|Tython]] and finds the [[holocron of Belia Darzu]].<ref name="ROT">''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]''</ref>
*Darth Bane and his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], [[Darth Zannah/Legends|Darth Zannah]], [[Duel on Tython|duel]] [[Valenthyne Farfalla]], [[Raskta Lsu]], [[Worror Dowmat]], [[Johun Othone]], and [[Sarro Xaj]] on [[Tython/Legends|Tython]].<ref name="ROT" />
*Zannah arranges a [[Confrontation on Ambria|confrontation]] that results in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] belief that the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] have been eliminated from [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="ROT" />
*[[Bodo Baas's Master]] writes down his prophecy about the Skywalker twins and the [[Palpatine/Legends|Reborn Emperor]]. Later, the prophecy will be recorded in the [[Tedryn Holocron]]. [[10 ABY/Legends|A thousand years later]] it will be retold to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]].<ref name="DE6">[[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]]</ref>{{Circa}}
